scripts.build:wasm: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build crates/spd-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../web/src/wasm --out-name spd_wasm
scripts.dev: bun run build:wasm && bun run --filter spd-seed-analyzer-web dev
scripts.build: bun run build:wasm && bun run --filter spd-seed-analyzer-web build
scripts.check:rust: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" cargo fmt --all -- --check && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.check:all: bun run check && bun run check:rust
scripts.format: bun run format:ts && bun run format:rust
scripts.lint: bun run lint:ts && bun run lint:rust
